# Vinay Raja

> Senior creative and digital experience leader with 15+ years connecting brand strategy, digital product, and customer experience. Based in Sydney, Australia. Strategic creative work delivered through Tydal Agency.

Vinay Raja is a Creative & Digital Experience Director who works at the intersection of brand, product, and customer experience. He spent seven years as Creative & Digital Experience Director at AVJennings across Australia and New Zealand, preceded by leading Creative Services across Asia Pacific at PageGroup. He currently serves as Chief Digital Officer & Board Member at Plasmatic (Singapore) and operates Tydal Agency, his strategic creative consultancy based in Sydney.

## Focus areas

- Brand and product alignment — closing the gap between brand strategy and product experience so the promise and the delivery match
- End-to-end digital experience — UX governance, behavioural analytics, A/B testing, and platform thinking across the customer lifecycle
- In-house creative capability — building multidisciplinary teams, structured workflows, brand governance, and quality standards at scale
- Executive and board-level strategic advisory on creative direction, prioritisation, and digital transformation

## Selected impact

- AVJennings (ANZ) — built and led the in-house creative and digital function from scratch; achieved 60% faster speed to market
- AVJennings (ANZ) — strategic redesign and migration of digital platforms from legacy infrastructure to modern headless CMS; established UX governance and continuous optimisation
- PageGroup (Asia Pacific) — transformed a high-volume production studio into a multidisciplinary strategic creative function spanning multiple countries
- Infigo — co-founded a mobile-first F&B service platform; secured USD 50,000 seed funding via Start-Up Chile

## Background

- Master of Design, Swinburne University of Technology
- Postgraduate Diploma in Innovation & Design Thinking, MIT (2020–2022)
- 15+ years of senior creative and digital leadership across Singapore, Sydney, and Asia Pacific

## Where to engage

- [Tydal Agency](https://tydal.agency) — strategic creative consultancy where current client work is delivered
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/vinayraja/) — professional profile and ongoing activity
- Sydney, NSW, Australia
